title: ScreenContract
description: Machine-readable surface contract for workspace composition. Artifact #7 per global-system-architecture-spec.md §20. Operationalizes information-architecture-workspace-map.md §19.

surfaceId.description: Unique identifier for the surface governed by this contract.

description.description: Purpose and scope of this surface.

workspaceFamily.description: Which of the 7 workspace families this surface belongs to. Per workspace-map §7.

workspaceName.description: Specific workspace within the family, for families with sub-workspaces. Per workspace-map §7, §13.4.

navigationLevel.description: Whether this surface is a primary navigation target or local navigation within a functional area. Per workspace-map §9.

surfaceType.description: Classification of this surface's primary function.

accessRequirements.description: Role and scope requirements for accessing this surface. Per workspace-map §8, org-facility §17.

allowedRoles.description: Role categories permitted to access this surface.

entityContextRequired.description: Entity context identifiers that must be present (e.g., tenantId, facilityId, patientDfn).

readWritePosture.description: Whether this surface is read-only, controlled-write, or mixed.

directWriteAllowed.description: Whether the surface may issue write operations to source systems. Defaults to false (conservative). Write paths must go through governed API routes.

dataSources.description: Data sources this surface consumes. Per contract-first (VE-PLAT-ADR-0002).

dataClassification.description: Data classification level for this surface. Per specialty-content-analytics §12, workspace-map §15.3.

phiGovernance.description: Required when dataClassification is 'phi'. Per workspace-map §19.2 rule 3.

claimSurface.description: Claim surface declaration. Null if this surface does not present capability/readiness claims. Per capability-truth §10, workspace-map §17.

analyticsSurface.description: Analytics surface declaration. Null if this is not an analytics/BI surface. Per specialty-content-analytics §11, workspace-map §15/§18.

crossWorkspaceTransitions.description: Declared cross-workspace transitions from or to this surface. Per workspace-map §10, §19.2 rule 6.

readinessDependencies.description: Readiness/eligibility dependencies that must be satisfied for this surface to be active.

refreshBehavior.description: How data on this surface is refreshed.

workspaceFamilyEnum.description: The 7 workspace families from global-system-architecture-spec.md §12 and workspace-map §7.

surfaceTypeEnum.description: Primary function classification of the surface.

dataClassificationEnum.description: Data classification levels per specialty-content-analytics §12 and workspace-map §19.1.

sourceDomainClassEnum.description: Source domain classes reflecting data ownership. VistA is source of truth for clinical/operational data. Platform governs config/governance. Analytics consumes derived read-models.

claimSurfaceTypeEnum.description: The 8 claim surface types from capability-truth-and-claim-gating-spec.md §10.

claimDomainEnum.description: Domains in which claims may be presented.

refreshBehaviorEnum.description: How data on this surface is refreshed. Per workspace-map §19.1.

phiDisclosureEnum.description: PHI disclosure level for analytics surfaces.

statusEnum.description: Lifecycle status of the screen contract.

transitionDirectionEnum.description: Direction of a cross-workspace transition relative to this surface.

dataSourceDeclaration.description: A data source consumed by this surface.

sourceId.description: Identifier for the data source (e.g., RPC name, API route, read-model name).

sourceDomainClass.description: Which truth domain this source belongs to.

description.description: What data this source provides to the surface.

phiGovernanceDeclaration.description: PHI governance details. Required when dataClassification is 'phi'. Per workspace-map §19.2 rule 3, specialty-content-analytics §12.

justification.description: Why PHI access is necessary for this surface.

minimumNecessary.description: Whether only minimum-necessary PHI fields are included.

auditRequired.description: Whether access to this surface must be auditable.

claimSurfaceDeclaration.description: Claim surface details. Per capability-truth §10, workspace-map §17.

claimSurfaceType.description: Which of the 8 claim surface types this surface is.

claimDomains.description: What claim domains this surface may present.

informationalOnly.description: Whether claim content is informational-only (no eligible actions) or tied to actions.

gatingRuleRef.description: Reference to the claim-gating rule from capability-truth §11 that governs this surface. Per workspace-map §19.2 rule 5.

minimumReadinessState.description: Minimum readiness state required for claims presented on this surface.

analyticsSurfaceDeclaration.description: Analytics/BI surface details. Per specialty-content-analytics §11, workspace-map §15/§18.

analyticsType.description: What kind of analytics surface this is.

derivedDataOnly.description: Whether this surface consumes only derived/aggregated data (not direct operational data).

writeProhibited.description: Whether write operations are prohibited on this surface. Must be true for analytics workspace surfaces per specialty-content-analytics §11 rule 3.

refreshCadence.description: How frequently the analytics data is refreshed.

phiDisclosure.description: PHI disclosure level. 'none' for de-identified by default per workspace-map §15.4.

crossWorkspaceTransition.description: A declared cross-workspace transition. Per workspace-map §10, §19.1, §19.2 rule 6.

direction.description: Whether this is an outgoing transition from this surface or an incoming transition to this surface.

targetWorkspaceFamily.description: The workspace family of the transition target (outgoing) or source (incoming).

targetSurfaceId.description: Optional: specific surface ID in the target workspace.

contextParameters.description: Context parameters passed during the transition (e.g., tenantId, patientDfn, encounterRef). Per workspace-map §10 rule T2.

accessReEvaluation.description: Whether the user's access must be re-evaluated when entering the target workspace. Per workspace-map §10 rule T3.

readinessDependency.description: A readiness/eligibility dependency for this surface.

dependencyType.description: What kind of readiness this surface depends on.

referenceId.description: Identifier for the readiness subject (capability ID, market ID, payer ID, etc.).
